picks.analysis: SMCI scores +18 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Narrative (+7), reinforced by Fundamentals (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Earnings Surprise (+2, +34.5%), Guidance (+2, +26.0%). Cutting the other way: Analyst Price Target (-1, -10% to $37.13), RSI 14 (-1, 74.2). Within Technology we gave SMCI a +18 and DELL a +17 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take SMCI calls over DELL calls, mainly on Technicals (+2 vs +1). The suggested calls sit ~21.1% OTM with 49d to expiry, delta 0.34, mid $2.55 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
